summary: Iteration 4 testing complete. Verified new features: Employee module with CRUD, salary payments, document tracking with expiry alerts, DateFilter on Sales/Expenses/Supplier Payments. All 27 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI verification successful for all new components.

issues: Console warning: HTML hydration error about <tr> inside <span> - React DevTools artifact, not functional issue

passed_tests: Backend: Login with test@example.com/password123 returns access_token
Backend: GET /api/employees returns list
Backend: POST /api/employees creates employee with name, doc_id, salary, position, pay_frequency
Backend: POST /api/employees with join_date and document_expiry works
Backend: POST /api/employees with branch_id works
Backend: PUT /api/employees/{id} updates employee
Backend: DELETE /api/employees/{id} deletes employee
Backend: GET /api/salary-payments returns list
Backend: POST /api/salary-payments with cash mode works
Backend: POST /api/salary-payments with bank mode works
Backend: POST /api/salary-payments with branch_id works
Backend: DELETE /api/salary-payments/{id} deletes payment
Backend: GET /api/documents returns list
Backend: POST /api/documents creates license document with alert_days
Backend: POST /api/documents creates insurance document
Backend: POST /api/documents creates permit document
Backend: PUT /api/documents/{id} updates document
Backend: DELETE /api/documents/{id} deletes document
Backend: GET /api/documents/alerts/upcoming returns alerts list
Backend: Alerts sorted by days_left ascending
Backend: Alerts include employee document expiry
Backend: Expired documents show 'expired' status with negative days_left
Backend: POST /api/export/data type=employees format=excel works
Backend: POST /api/export/data type=employees format=pdf works
Backend: Document status=active for expiry > alert_days
Backend: Document status=expiring_soon for expiry within alert_days
Backend: Document status=expired for past expiry dates
Frontend: Navigation has Employees and Documents links
Frontend: Dashboard shows document expiry alerts section
Frontend: Employees page loads with table and stats cards
Frontend: Employees page has Add Employee button
Frontend: Employees page has PDF/Excel export buttons
Frontend: Employee dialog has name, doc_id, salary, position, pay_frequency, join_date, doc_expiry fields
Frontend: Pay Salary button opens dialog
Frontend: Pay Salary dialog has amount, period, payment_mode (cash/bank), branch selection, date
Frontend: Documents page loads with table and stats cards (Total, Active, Expiring Soon, Expired)
Frontend: Documents page has Expiry Alerts section
Frontend: Documents page has Add Document button
Frontend: Add Document dialog has name, type, number, related_to, issue_date, expiry_date, alert_days fields
Frontend: Documents table shows status badges (Active, Expiring Soon, Expired)
Frontend: Sales page has DateFilter component with Period dropdown
Frontend: Expenses page has DateFilter component
Frontend: Supplier Payments page has DateFilter component
Frontend: DateFilter dropdown has All Time, Today, This Month, This Year, Custom options
Frontend: DateFilter Custom option shows From/To date inputs
critical_code_review_comments: All new Employee, Document, SalaryPayment endpoints implemented correctly
Document expiry alerts endpoint returns sorted results with correct status calculation
DateFilter component properly integrated on Sales, Expenses, Supplier Payments pages
Export employees endpoint works with both PDF and Excel formats
Employee document_expiry tracked separately from Documents collection
seed_data_creation: Test data from previous iterations: 1 employee (Ahmed Khan, Manager, $5000, doc expiry Mar 15 2026), 1 document (Trade License, TL-2024, Main Office, expiry Feb 28 2026 - 17 days left)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 complete. New features tested: 1) /api/employees CRUD with document_id, salary, pay_frequency, join_date, document_expiry, 2) /api/salary-payments CRUD with cash/bank mode and branch selection, 3) /api/documents CRUD with document_type, expiry_date, alert_days, 4) /api/documents/alerts/upcoming returns expiring/expired docs sorted by days_left, 5) /api/export/data type=employees works, 6) DateFilter component on Sales/Expenses/Supplier Payments with All Time/Today/Month/Year/Custom options. Console hydration warnings from React DevTools are artifacts not functional bugs. WhatsApp/email alert sending not tested (requires Twilio/SMTP config) - alerts work in-app via dashboard and documents page.
